summary: E-commerce Reconciliation enhanced features fully tested. All 15 backend API tests passed. Frontend UI verified: Upload dialog shows firm selection as first field, platform dropdown changes file accept type (CSV for Amazon, XLSX for Flipkart), expected columns/sheets info updates based on platform. Statements list shows Firm column and has firm filter. Flipkart statements show Charges and Tax Breakdown tabs. Summary cards show platform-specific fields (Ad Spend, Service Charges for Flipkart vs Reserve Held/Released for Amazon).
critical_code_review_comments: Flipkart multi-sheet Excel parser correctly handles: Orders, MP Fee Rebate, Non_Order_SPF, Storage_Recall, Value Added Services, Google Ads Services, Ads, TCS_Recovery, TDS, GST_Details sheets
Firm selection is properly required before uploading statements - each firm has separate reconciliation
Platform dropdown correctly changes file accept type: .csv for Amazon, .xlsx/.xls for Flipkart
Flipkart-specific tabs (Charges, Tax Breakdown) only appear for Flipkart statements
Amazon-specific summary cards (Reserve Held, Reserve Released) only appear for Amazon statements
Flipkart-specific summary cards (Ad Spend, Service Charges) only appear for Flipkart statements
Tax breakdown shows TCS, TDS, GST on Fees with export functionality
Non-order charges tracking includes ads, services, rebates, claims categories
seed_data_creation: Flipkart Excel file uploaded during testing created statement STMT-FLI-20260404160121 with multi-sheet data. Amazon CSV uploaded created statement STMT-AMA-20260404160120 with firm association.
context_for_next_testing_agent: E-commerce Reconciliation module enhanced with firm selection and Flipkart multi-sheet parser. Dashboard at /finance/ecommerce-reconciliation. 1 Flipkart statement and 4 Amazon statements exist in system. Flipkart statements show Charges and Tax Breakdown tabs. Amazon statements show Reserve Held/Released cards. Upload dialog requires firm selection first.

Backend Tests.GET /api/firms: PASS - Returns list of firms for selection
Backend Tests.POST /api/ecommerce/upload-payout?platfo: PASS - Uploads Amazon CSV with firm association
PASS - Uploads Flipkart Excel with multi-sheet parsing
Backend Tests.GET /api/ecommerce/statements/{id}: PASS - Returns transactions, order_summaries, non_order_charges, tax_entries
Backend Tests.Flipkart non_order_charges: PASS - Returns charges from MP Fee Rebate, Non_Order_SPF, Storage_Recall, Value Added Services, Google Ads Services, Ads sheets
Backend Tests.Flipkart tax_entries: PASS - Returns entries from TCS_Recovery, TDS, GST_Details sheets
Backend Tests.Flipkart summary tax fields: PASS - Includes total_tcs, total_tds, total_gst_on_fees, total_ad_spend, total_service_charges
Backend Tests.Statement firm_name in list: PASS - Statements include firm_name for display
Backend Tests.Order reconciliation endpoint: PASS - Returns order summaries with match status
Backend Tests.Export charges: PASS - Export endpoint accepts charges type
Backend Tests.Export taxes: PASS - Export endpoint accepts taxes type

Frontend Tests.Upload dialog firm selection: PASS - 'Select Firm' dropdown appears as first field
Frontend Tests.Expected columns/sheets info: PASS - Updates based on platform selection
Frontend Tests.Statements list Firm column: PASS - Shows firm name in table
Frontend Tests.Flipkart Tax Breakdown tab: PASS - Shows TCS, TDS, GST summary cards
Frontend Tests.Flipkart summary cards: PASS - Shows Ad Spend, Service Charges
Frontend Tests.Amazon summary cards: PASS - Shows Reserve Held, Reserve Released
Frontend Tests.Amazon no Charges/Tax tabs: PASS - Charges and Tax Breakdown tabs hidden for Amazon
